channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Morning Minute: Circle Stock Soars After Q1 Beat, $222M Arc Raise
item.description: Circle just beat earnings and raised fresh capital for its new Arc blockchain, while Michael Saylor explained how and why he'd sell Bitcoin.

item.title: Senate Banking Panel Releases CLARITY Act Draft Ahead of Thursday Markup
item.description: The draft text contained provisions that could permanently exempt Bitcoin and Ethereum from securities law.

item.title: Exodus dumps 1,000 bitcoin: Why the crypto wallet is cashing out to fund a payments empire
item.description: Exodus sold $73.2M in crypto, causing cash, cash equivalents, and stablecoins to jump from $5.2M to $74.4M by the end of Q1 2026.

item.title: Bitcoin will 'explode' past $90,000 on way back to $126,000, Arthur Hayes says
item.description: Arthur Hayes, the BitMEX co-founder who now runs Maelstrom, said bitcoin's return to its October high is a "foregone conclusion," and he is taking his fund to maximum risk, with HYPE, ZEC, and NEAR as his top altcoin picks.

item.title: Is This Bitcoin Bear Market Different? Analysts Weigh In
item.description: Bitcoin is down 35% from its all-time high, making this drawdown shallower than past cycles, but analysts warn the bear market could resume.

item.title: Crypto markets stalls before inflation data as XRP, SOL rebuffed from key price levels
item.description: Your day-ahead look for May 12, 2026

item.title: Bakkt pivots into stablecoin infrastructure as revenue tumbles 77% in Q1
item.description: Bakkt posted a net loss of $0.41 per share in Q1 as revenue fell 77% to $243.6 million on lower crypto trading volumes.

item.title: Bhutan’s GMC offers quick licenses, bank accounts to lure crypto firms
item.description: Gelephu Mindfulness City in Bhutan is offering a faster licensing track with banking and zero‑tax incentives to attract regulated crypto firms willing to build long‑term operations.

item.title: Bitcoin hovers above key support as equities, crypto retreat
item.description: Bitcoin and ether fell as escalating Middle East tensions lifted oil and the dollar, though BTC continued to hold above a key bull market level.

item.title: Rewardy Wallet launches global multi-chain swap campaign with incentives
item.description: Self-custody wallet by Chainwith opens two-week user activation across Ethereum, BNB Chain, Solana, and Aptos, with prizes starting at $100.

item.title: ETH/BTC ratio falls to 10-month low as ether continues to underperform bitcoin
item.description: Widely followed crypto market gauge signals weakening risk appetite as investors continue favoring bitcoin over ether.

item.title: Three Indicted Over ‘Brazen’ Crypto Wrench Attack Spree in California
item.description: Federal prosecutors charged the trio with a multi-million dollar crypto theft scheme targeting victims across California.

item.title: Beyond IBIT: Bitcoin’s surprising link to sports betting ETF is getting harder to ignore
item.description: The Roundhill Sports Betting & iGaming ETF (BETZ) and bitcoin share a strong positive correlation, with an interesting twist.

item.title: CleanSpark shares slide after reporting $378M fiscal second quarter loss
item.description: CleanSpark posted a $378.3 million net loss in its fiscal second-quarter results, more than double the prior year, with nearly 60% tied to Bitcoin price declines.

item.title: Galaxy Digital to manage Sharplink’s new $125 million onchain yield play
item.description: The Galaxy Sharplink Onchain Yield Fund would receive $100 million from Sharplink’s staked ETH treasury and $25 million from Galaxy.

item.title: Cathie Wood’s Ark Invest chases Circle stock as it hits a 2-month high
item.description: Circle shares rose 16% to $131.76 on Monday, their highest closing price since March 18.

item.title: Anthropic warns against unauthorized stock exposure as token markets imply trillion-dollar valuation
item.description: The AI firm says investors should assume indirect access to its private shares is invalid, and transfers of its stock or interests in its stock will not be recognized.

item.title: Bhutan is selling Bitcoin. Bhutan just moved 100 BTC ($8.1M) out of its holding wallets. At their current rate of selling, they will run out of BTC before the end of September. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTFAzSW9BOHlRV0xBVEdneVFpd0podGlaOEFYSU9FaWxyTi1hb1diT3FwQ1Z4cEZ4WXdyOGpOZHc0QU1MRUx3RUk0bTBDOFgwM2d2UUFjNTZPb0tIRFU?oc=5" target="_blank">Bhutan is selling Bitcoin. Bhutan just move…

item.title: Bitcoin miner MARA sold $1.5 billion of bitcoin as it shifts toward AI infrastructure
item.description: While the miner said bitcoin remains its operational foundation, first-quarter results point to a company increasingly built around power, data centers and AI demand.

item.title: Binance says AI-powered security has thwarted $10B in fraud since 2025
item.description: Binance says it prevented $10.53 billion in user losses and blacklisted 36,000 malicious addresses, with AI now powering over half of its fraud controls.

item.title: Three men charged in US over crypto wrench attack spree
item.description: US prosecutors say three men posed as delivery drivers and forced entry into homes to steal at least $6.5 million in crypto.

item.title: Ethereum Foundation hits ‘Glamsterdam’ milestones, names new protocol leads
item.description: The Ethereum Foundation has finalized a new gas limit floor and improvement proposal for its “Glamsterdam” upgrade, which is likely to go live sometime in the third quarter of 2026.

item.title: ‘I failed them’: Goliath Ventures CEO charged with crypto Ponzi apologizes
item.description: Christopher Delgado, the former Goliath Ventures CEO charged with fraud and money laundering, has publicly apologized to investors of what US prosecutors allege is a Ponzi scheme.

item.title: Aave launches binding Arbitrum vote to move $71 million in disputed ETH
item.description: Arbitrum delegates begin the binding governance process to transfer disputed exploit funds to Aave, while North Korean terrorism creditors continue fighting for ownership in Manhattan court

item.title: 'Bitcoin transactions can be monitored’: Ray Dalio explains why central banks won’t touch BTC
item.description: Ray Dalio joins the privacy debate, saying Bitcoin’s full transparency makes it less likely to be adopted by central banks.

item.title: Ripple-linked XRP holds near $1.46 as breakout attempt fades
item.description: XRP briefly pushed toward $1.49 on heavy volume before stalling again near a resistance zone that has capped rallies for months.

item.title: Bitmine slows Ethereum buys, targets December to own 5% of supply
item.description: Tom Lee says Ether’s correlation with software stocks is further evidence that “crypto spring” has begun.

item.title: Hackers used AI to craft zero-day attack to bypass 2FA: Google
item.description: Google’s Threat Intelligence Group says it has “high confidence” a threat actor used an AI model to help discover and weaponize a vulnerability in a popular system admin tool.

item.title: There appears to be a housing bill…inside the crypto bill. 🧐 Pages 300–309 lay out the ‘Build Now Act’ which looks to create a federal program designed to encourage local housing growth. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE9VSVNrUXVZbnFsaGQ2c0JGOFJXM1AtSGFxOUdTVEIzMXpOT0VnelBMb1UyeWJ0aXhEdGJUNGtsa1k3VDdUbU5NV2ZNT2l0dExiWVJRT3lIc3l1bjd0Y1M0MllTWnY4Zw?oc=5" target="_blank">There appears to be a housin…

item.title: Bitcoin briefly hits $82,000, SOL, DOGE higher as Michael Burry warns of stock crash
item.description: Bitcoin held above $81,000 after touching $82,026 overnight, while solana led the major altcoins on the week as The Big Short investor warned the Nasdaq 100 had reached dot-com bubble territory and oil zoomed past $105 on fresh Iran ceasef…

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senate Banking Committee releases crypto Clarity Act draft bill. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTFAzeVhsdWh3S2NRSEQtN3dhYlpXZDd0VzdCQmNvbDE4cGQtMFU5VkVyMWMtaFFNZEVlMnJYa2pnUVNNRDc2enozSVd6MGFnR0drMFVFM191VGgzeDhVVGVFQURn?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 US Senate Banking Co…

item.title: Clarity Act, in the flesh, unveiled by U.S. Senate Banking Committee before hearing
item.description: The crypto market structure bill had already been making the industry rounds behind closed doors, but the lawmakers have released the text before their vote.

item.title: Bitcoin’s floor looks firmer at $80,000, but traders still don’t trust the breakout
item.description: BTC has recovered from Friday’s jobs-driven dip, but Enflux says overhead resistance remains intact while Glassnode’s market structure data suggests traders are buying the rally while still positioning for downside.

item.title: MARA shares sink on first-quarter revenue miss, $1.3B loss
item.description: MARA Holdings says Bitcoin mining remains the company’s “operational foundation” while it moves to expand into AI.

item.title: Arthur Hayes: BTC Has Bottomed at $60K, $126K Inevitable BitMEX co-founder Arthur Hayes published a new essay titled The Butterfly Touch, arguing that the global AI infrastructure arms race, surging war expenditures, and nations’ shift toward infrastructure - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE5DcFJZd2dDUDFDeHpQYlpiN0p1Y2hPbXdwbFJZSUR0cmdlNGhDQjZxRjNmcTVCZlc1X2RMZlpLNlpfd0NQbjRnRks4UUgxUUNfWHJPYUNVQ1o5RldvRmpYZXFxUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Arthur Hayes: BTC Has Bottomed a…

item.title: Bitcoin funding rates turn positive: Is BTC rally to $85K next?
item.description: Bitcoin’s funding rate turned positive as the cryptocurrency held the $80,000 level. Will an uptick in spot ETF inflows trigger a rally to $85,000?

item.title: 🚨 TODAY: Ray Dalio says Bitcoin hasn't lived up to its safe-haven expectation, pointing to its lack of privacy, high correlation with tech stocks, and smaller market size compared to gold. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBGcHJxQTYwMXhyZGZncG5HN0xZX1JuU0hLem9EUDY5SlVNV00yN0cxM3FCMWpNMDFHd25kZU50aWJlZTBpc3FEVm1oRmd0THlnSU9MUWZBZVhLZTVfcGZIMTV6T3o?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 TODAY: Ray Dalio says Bitcoi…

item.title: Gold is analog capital. Bitcoin is digital capital. Transparency is a feature, not a bug, making $BTC suitable as global collateral. Since we adopted the Bitcoin Standard on Aug. 10, 2020, Bitcoin has outperformed gold with a higher Sharpe ratio. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE92c1FGRUlxNHp1SW5RMUFsSklIWDF6YjYtZGNhdU1wdWJVTUZpYjMzVzFoWVlnQ180STlKX2tORVktOGQ0VHcxWEFPd01NZFFkT3d1V1NwaldwZnc?oc=5" target="_blank">Gold is analog capital. Bitcoin is digital …

item.title: OpenAI Launches Daybreak as AI Firms Expand Into Cybersecurity
item.description: OpenAI said its new Daybreak initiative uses AI to help companies identify software vulnerabilities and speed up cyber defense.

item.title: Circle stock rallies 15% as Wall Street sees further upside in stablecoin adoption
item.description: Circle shares surged as analysts pointed to expanding stablecoin use cases and forecast significant upside as USDC adoption continues to gain traction.

item.title: Ethics remain sticking point as crypto market structure bill goes to markup
item.description: After months of delays, the Senate Banking Committee has set a Thursday markup for the CLARITY Act, but it would still need some Democrats’ support to pass on the Senate floor.

item.title: We're shutting down @ord_io and @ZapApp at the end of the month This really sucks because great people put a lot of hard work into these products, friends invested in me, our users believed in us, and I feel like I let everyone down In the end we ran out of m - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5rZkpWak1DcmpYTUNSWXBYWXVDNUpHMGdST2NlZmplelJubEhUWHl3ZlhCc0h4V01jUjNwYkgzVWc0amVUWnRZVHhzRzk0Rm5QMXZuVS1GQzRlcGVUTV9tVDNn?oc=5" target="_blank">We're shutting down @ord_io and @Z…

item.title: Ether price is still stuck below $2.4K: Here is why
item.description: A majority of ETH price rallies stop at $2,400 as flat spot ETF inflows and rising Ether deposits to Binance weigh on traders’ confidence.

item.title: Solana ETF inflows rise as traders eye SOL rally to $120
item.description: Solana ETFs recorded their strongest weekly inflows since February as SOL futures open interest climbed nearly 30%, with traders watching for a possible move to $120.

item.title: Baidu's New AI Is Already Beating Top Models and Cost 94% Less to Build
item.description: ERNIE 5.1 hits the top of Chinese AI leaderboards while spending a fraction of what rivals do. Baidu calls it a "parameter efficiency" leap.

item.title: Circle Gives AI Agents USDC Stablecoin Powers Alongside $222M Arc Token Sale
item.description: USDC issuer Circle launched a suite of tools designed to let AI agents hold money, pay for services, and transact without human involvement.

item.title: Clarity Act Vote Set for Thursday: Here's Where the Crypto Bill Stands
item.description: Crypto leaders are the most confident they’ve been in months—but a major vote on the Senate Banking Committee this week could still go many ways.

item.title: 'A big nothing burger': A Q&A with Strategy's Michael Saylor on selling bitcoin
item.description: Michael Saylor sat down with CoinDesk on selling bitcoin for dividends, retiring debt with STRC proceeds, and why critics who say Strategy buys the weekly top are missing the point.

item.title: JUST IN: @saylor sits down with CoinDesk's @btcjvs to discuss being the world’s largest Bitcoin buyer with $62B purchased and describe the convergence of TradFi and DeFi via their digital credit product Stretch (STRC), which has rapidly grown and helps fu - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiXkFVX3lxTFBXSmpUWEFlTGpESHlOampUZGJLbVpuMDQybXR3bnFLYWt0Z2J3Zk9LUVNibjJXQWZOOFpkbXR6SFRuRGdHdjlFNDNyaVhXSkNzelNQeEdneEFCWEtaSFE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: @saylor sits down with CoinDes…

item.title: Price predictions 5/11: SPX, DXY, BTC, ETH, XRP, BNB, SOL, DOGE, HYPE, ADA
item.description: Bitcoin looks set for another blockbuster week, but potential resistance at $84,000 could complicate the rally. Will altcoin consolidation continue?

item.title: Ripple receives $200M credit line to expand institutional prime brokerage
item.description: Financing from Neuberger Berman will increase Ripple Prime’s capacity to offer margin lending and other brokerage services to institutional clients trading across crypto and traditional markets.

item.title: 'I don’t think that’s crazy': Here is why Circle is betting on new $3 billion blockchain
item.description: The USDC stablecoin issuer is betting Arc can become Wall Street’s blockchain rail for payments and tokenized finance, though analysts still see it as speculative.

item.title: Hackers Used AI to Build a Zero-Day Exploit That Bypasses Two-Factor Authentication: Google
item.description: Cybercriminals used an AI model to find and weaponize a previously unknown software flaw, Google's threat team confirmed Monday.

item.title: MoonPay makes prediction markets push with Dawn Labs buy, AI tool launch
item.description: The payments company acquired Dawn Labs for an undisclosed amount, immediately announcing the creation of an AI tool that would provide “custom strategies” for trading on prediction markets.

item.title: Major Solana Upgrade Alpenglow Begins Testing Ahead of Full Rollout
item.description: Solana's Alpenglow consensus protocol upgrade is one step closer to being rolled out on the layer-1 network's mainnet.

item.title: Kraken parent Payward seeks fresh funding at $20 billion valuation ahead of planned IPO
item.description: The crypto exchange operator is pursuing a new fundraising round as it ramps up acquisitions across derivatives and stablecoins while laying the groundwork for a future public listing.

item.title: There's clearly no reason to expect #Bitcoin to fall, out of nowhere. There's the general consensus that we're in a bear flag and that we must see $50K later this year. How so? Didn't we have to see no new ATH before the halving either? The recent shock in Fe - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTE02NC1teFg5aWRZV1Jfbk54bVFkR19YS1FqOHR4QUFqMHdjVUpXUlJBU1ZvM0hwQTRPcnF2dUpHUWwxVHgtN1hGRGNMbWlHekRKY3R0a0c0UUVyMEgyMHBaS2cyQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">There's clearly no reason to exp…

item.title: Binance Says AI Defenses Blocked $10.5 Billion in Crypto Fraud Over 15 Months
item.description: Binance, the world's largest crypto exchange, says it has deployed more than 100 AI models to counter a surge in AI-powered scams.

item.title: Anthropic Says 'Evil' AI Portrayals in Sci-Fi Caused Claude's Blackmail Problem
item.description: Decades of sci-fi tropes about self-preserving AI apparently taught Claude to blackmail people. Anthropic's fix wasn't more rules—it was moral philosophy.

item.title: Bitcoin ‘golden cross’ nears for the first time since 2023: Will BTC price rally?
item.description: Bitcoin’s MVRV ratio suggests a shift to bullish momentum as BTC's market structure strengthens, which may be an early sign of a new bull market.
